provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against pi. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
`git bisect run <cmd>` drives the bisection for you: git
checks out the midpoint commit, runs <cmd>, and interprets
exit 0 as good, 1-124 as bad, and 125 as skip, halving the
candidate range each round until one commit remains. No live
debugging needed here, so here is the explanation only.
